section.heading: Construction of subchapters I and II; “individual with mental illness” defined

subsection.content: Subchapters I and II shall not be construed as establishing any new rights for individuals with mental illness.
For purposes of this section, the term “individual with mental illness” has the same meaning as in section 10802(3) 11 See References in Text note below. of this title.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 10802(3) of this title, referred to in subsec. (b), was redesignated section 10802(4) of this title by Pub. L. 102–173, § 4(1), Nov. 27, 1991, 105 Stat. 1217.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1991—Pub. L. 102–173, substituted “individuals with mental illness” for “mentally ill individuals” in subsec. (a) and “individual with mental illness” for “mentally ill individual” in subsec. (b).
